nonGoals: Do NOT change KNOWN_TAGS or validate.ts tag casing handling — that's a separate concern
Do NOT add tests — that's deliverable B
Do NOT change any other function in tags.ts
objective: Make getTagDef() case-insensitive by comparing lowercased tag names
planText: In apps/web/src/lib/ssml/tags.ts, change the getTagDef() function's find predicate from `t.tag === tagName` to `t.tag.toLowerCase() === tagName.toLowerCase()`. This single-line change makes tag lookup case-insensitive so 'PROSODY', 'Break', 'emphasis' all resolve to their correct definitions. Existing lowercase-only tests continue to pass unchanged.

nonGoals: Do NOT modify source code or any other test file
Do NOT add tests for KNOWN_TAGS casing (out of scope for this issue)
objective: Add 5 test cases for case-insensitive tag lookup and regression coverage
planText: In apps/web/src/lib/ssml/tags.test.ts, within the existing `describe('SSML Tag Registry', ...)` block, add 5 test cases: (1) getTagDef with all-uppercase 'PROSODY' returns the prosody definition, (2) getTagDef with mixed-case 'Break' returns the break definition, (3) getTagDef with lowercase 'emphasis' returns emphasis definition (regression), (4) getTagDef with unknown tag 'nonexistent' returns undefined (regression), (5) isTagSupportedByProvider('PROSODY', 'aws-polly') equals isTagSupportedByProvider('prosody', 'aws-polly') — validating the case-insensitive cascade through isTagSupportedByProvider.
